en: I have been trying to weasel my way out of being on the stage for weeks.
en_example: I have been trying to weasel my way out of being on the stage for weeks.
zh_example: I have been trying to weasel my way out of being on the stage for weeks.
ja: 巧妙に抜け出す、うまく逃れる
ja_example: I have been trying to weasel my way out of being on the stage for weeks.

zh: 脆弱性，易受傷害的狀態
en: I watched an old TED Talk that Bernay Brown did on vulnerability.
en_example: I watched an old TED Talk that Bernay Brown did on vulnerability.
zh_example: I watched an old TED Talk that Bernay Brown did on vulnerability.
ja_example: I watched an old TED Talk that Bernay Brown did on vulnerability.

en: She is a shame researcher and I am a recovering bulimic.
en_example: She is a shame researcher and I am a recovering bulimic.
zh_example: She is a shame researcher and I am a recovering bulimic.
ja_example: She is a shame researcher and I am a recovering bulimic.

zh: 正在康復中的暴食症患者
en: I am a recovering bulimic, alcoholic, and drug user.
en_example: I am a recovering bulimic, alcoholic, and drug user.
zh_example: I am a recovering bulimic, alcoholic, and drug user.
ja_example: I am a recovering bulimic, alcoholic, and drug user.

en: Dr. Brown defined courage as telling the story of who you are with your whole heart.
en_example: Dr. Brown defined courage as telling the story of who you are with your whole heart.
zh_example: Dr. Brown defined courage as telling the story of who you are with your whole heart.
ja_example: Dr. Brown defined courage as telling the story of who you are with your whole heart.

en: Making the unknown known is what is important.
en_example: Making the unknown known is what is important.
zh_example: Making the unknown known is what is important.
ja: 未知を既知にすること
ja_example: Making the unknown known is what is important.

en: When I was eight years old, I started to feel exposed and awkward.
en_example: When I was eight years old, I started to feel exposed and awkward.
zh_example: When I was eight years old, I started to feel exposed and awkward.
ja_example: When I was eight years old, I started to feel exposed and awkward.

en: I was pushed out of my house and into school, all oily and pudgy and conspicuous.
en_example: I was pushed out of my house and into school, all oily and pudgy and conspicuous.
zh_example: I was pushed out of my house and into school, all oily and pudgy and conspicuous.
ja_example: I was pushed out of my house and into school, all oily and pudgy and conspicuous.

en: I was oily and pudgy and conspicuous.
en_example: I was oily and pudgy and conspicuous.
zh_example: I was oily and pudgy and conspicuous.
ja_example: I was oily and pudgy and conspicuous.

zh: 超級英雄的披風，比喻保護自己的偽裝
en: Our superhero capes are what keep us from having to feel much at all.
en_example: Our superhero capes are what keep us from having to feel much at all.
zh_example: Our superhero capes are what keep us from having to feel much at all.
ja: スーパーヒーローのマント（比喩的に自分を守るもの）
ja_example: Our superhero capes are what keep us from having to feel much at all.

en: Perfectionism and overworking are some of our superhero capes.
en_example: Perfectionism and overworking are some of our superhero capes.
zh_example: Perfectionism and overworking are some of our superhero capes.
ja_example: Perfectionism and overworking are some of our superhero capes.

en: Snarkiness and apathy are superhero capes.
en_example: Snarkiness and apathy are superhero capes.
zh_example: Snarkiness and apathy are superhero capes.
ja_example: Snarkiness and apathy are superhero capes.

en: Every good and bad thing is deflected off of them.
en_example: Every good and bad thing is deflected off of them.
zh_example: Every good and bad thing is deflected off of them.
ja_example: Every good and bad thing is deflected off of them.

en: My capes of addiction and pretending kept me safe and hidden.
en_example: My capes of addiction and pretending kept me safe and hidden.
zh_example: My capes of addiction and pretending kept me safe and hidden.
ja_example: My capes of addiction and pretending kept me safe and hidden.

en: We start out as extremely sensitive truth tellers.
en_example: We start out as extremely sensitive truth tellers.
zh_example: We start out as extremely sensitive truth tellers.
ja_example: We start out as extremely sensitive truth tellers.

en: I was so exhausted and so numb that I never had to go back.
en_example: I was so exhausted and so numb that I never had to go back.
zh_example: I was so exhausted and so numb that I never had to go back.
ja_example: I was so exhausted and so numb that I never had to go back.

en: I walked into my guidance counselor's office and said, actually, I'm not fine.
en_example: I walked into my guidance counselor's office and said, actually, I'm not fine.
zh_example: I walked into my guidance counselor's office and said, actually, I'm not fine.
ja: 進路指導カウンセラー
ja_example: I walked into my guidance counselor's office and said, actually, I'm not fine.

en: I was sent to a mental hospital.
en_example: I was sent to a mental hospital.
zh_example: I was sent to a mental hospital.
ja_example: I was sent to a mental hospital.

en: In the mental hospital, there was no pretending.
en_example: In the mental hospital, there was no pretending.
zh_example: In the mental hospital, there was no pretending.
ja_example: In the mental hospital, there was no pretending.

en: In the mental hospital, the jig was up.
en_example: In the mental hospital, the jig was up.
zh_example: In the mental hospital, the jig was up.
ja_example: In the mental hospital, the jig was up.

en: Her arms were just sliced up like pre-cut hands.
en_example: Her arms were just sliced up like pre-cut hands.
zh_example: Her arms were just sliced up like pre-cut hands.
ja_example: Her arms were just sliced up like pre-cut hands.

en: I binged and purged for the first time when I was 8.
en_example: I binged and purged for the first time when I was 8.
zh_example: I binged and purged for the first time when I was 8.
ja: 過食と嘔吐を繰り返す
ja_example: I binged and purged for the first time when I was 8.

en: I found myself on the cold bathroom floor hung over.
en_example: I found myself on the cold bathroom floor hung over.
zh_example: I found myself on the cold bathroom floor hung over.
ja_example: I found myself on the cold bathroom floor hung over.

en: I was holding a positive pregnancy test.
en_example: I was holding a positive pregnancy test.
zh_example: I was holding a positive pregnancy test.
ja_example: I was holding a positive pregnancy test.

en: That day on the bathroom floor, I decided to show up.
en_example: That day on the bathroom floor, I decided to show up.
zh_example: That day on the bathroom floor, I decided to show up.
ja_example: That day on the bathroom floor, I decided to show up.

en: I didn't know how to be a sober person.
en_example: I didn't know how to be a sober person.
zh_example: I didn't know how to be a sober person.
ja_example: I didn't know how to be a sober person.

zh: 脫下偽裝，放下保護自己的外衣
en: What they don't tell you about peeling off your capes is that it gets worse before better.
en_example: What they don't tell you about peeling off your capes is that it gets worse before better.
zh_example: What they don't tell you about peeling off your capes is that it gets worse before better.
ja: マントを脱ぎ捨てる（比喩的に偽りを捨てる）
ja_example: What they don't tell you about peeling off your capes is that it gets worse before better.

en: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.
en_example: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.
zh_example: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.
ja_example: Getting sober is like recovering from frostbite.

en: At first, it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.
en_example: At first, it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.
zh_example: At first, it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.
ja: ピリピリする、チクチクする
ja_example: At first, it just feels kind of tingly and uncomfortable.

en: Then those feelings start to feel like daggers.
en_example: Then those feelings start to feel like daggers.
zh_example: Then those feelings start to feel like daggers.
ja_example: Then those feelings start to feel like daggers.

en: I finally accepted that sensitive is just how I was made.
en_example: I finally accepted that sensitive is just how I was made.
zh_example: I finally accepted that sensitive is just how I was made.
ja_example: I finally accepted that sensitive is just how I was made.

en: I write and I serve people to help create a world.
en_example: I write and I serve people to help create a world.
zh_example: I write and I serve people to help create a world.
ja_example: I write and I serve people to help create a world.

en: Tell the truth and forgive each other for being human.
en_example: Tell the truth and forgive each other for being human.
zh_example: Tell the truth and forgive each other for being human.
ja_example: Tell the truth and forgive each other for being human.

en: Together we can do hard things.
en_example: Together we can do hard things.
zh_example: Together we can do hard things.
ja_example: Together we can do hard things.

en: I used to numb my feelings and hide.
en_example: I used to numb my feelings and hide.
zh_example: I used to numb my feelings and hide.
ja_example: I used to numb my feelings and hide.

en: Feelings are just guides to tell me what is the next right thing to do.
en_example: Feelings are just guides to tell me what is the next right thing to do.
zh_example: Feelings are just guides to tell me what is the next right thing to do.
ja_example: Feelings are just guides to tell me what is the next right thing to do.

en: Loneliness leads us to connection with other people.
en_example: Loneliness leads us to connection with other people.
zh_example: Loneliness leads us to connection with other people.
ja_example: Loneliness leads us to connection with other people.

en: Jealousy guides us to what we're supposed to do next.
en_example: Jealousy guides us to what we're supposed to do next.
zh_example: Jealousy guides us to what we're supposed to do next.
ja_example: Jealousy guides us to what we're supposed to do next.

en: Being overwhelmed helps us to ask for help.
en_example: Being overwhelmed helps us to ask for help.
zh_example: Being overwhelmed helps us to ask for help.
ja_example: Being overwhelmed helps us to ask for help.

en: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.
en_example: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.
zh_example: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.
ja_example: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.

en: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.
en_example: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.
zh_example: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.
ja_example: The prizes are peace and dignity and friendship.

en: We just need awkward, oily, honest human beings.
en_example: We just need awkward, oily, honest human beings.
zh_example: We just need awkward, oily, honest human beings.
ja_example: We just need awkward, oily, honest human beings.

zh: 繼續前進的戰士（鼓勵用語）
en: Dear Glennon, it's braver to be Clark Kent than it is to be Superman. Carry on warrior.
en_example: Dear Glennon, it's braver to be Clark Kent than it is to be Superman. Carry on warrior.
zh_example: Dear Glennon, it's braver to be Clark Kent than it is to be Superman. Carry on warrior.
ja: 戦い続ける戦士（励ましの言葉）
ja_example: Dear Glennon, it's braver to be Clark Kent than it is to be Superman. Carry on warrior.
